## What does this change?

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Used the theme utilities (`bg-surface`, `text-ink`, `text-accent`…), not hard-coded hex colors
- [ ] Copy uses plain hyphens (no em/en dashes)
- [ ] Content changes went in `content/` where possible
